2603.28333.title: Integrating Multimodal Large Language Model Knowledge into Amodal Completion
2603.28333.paper_summary: With the widespread adoption of autonomous vehicles and robotics, amodal completion, which reconstructs the occluded parts of people and objects in an image, has become increasingly crucial. Just as humans infer hidden regions based on prior experience and common sense, this task inherently requires physical knowledge about real-world entities. However, existing approaches either depend solely on the image generation ability of visual generative models, which lack such knowledge, or leverage it only during the segmentation stage, preventing it from explicitly guiding the completion process. To address this, we propose AmodalCG, a novel framework that harnesses the real-world knowledge of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to guide amodal completion. Our framework first assesses the extent of occlusion to selectively invoke MLLM guidance only when the target object is heavily occluded. If guidance is required, the framework further incorporates MLLMs to reason about both the (1) extent and (2) content of the missing regions. Finally, a visual generative model integrates these guidance and iteratively refines imperfect completions that may arise from inaccurate MLLM guidance. Experimental results on various real-world images show impressive improvements compared to all existing works, suggesting MLLMs as a promising direction for addressing challenging amodal completion.
2603.28333.paper_summary_zh: 隨著自動駕駛車輛和機器人技術的廣泛應用，無模式完成（amodal completion）變得越來越重要，這項技術能重建圖像中被遮擋的人物和物體部分。正如人類根據先前的經驗和常識推斷隱藏區域，這項任務本質上需要對現實世界實體的物理知識。然而，現有的方法要麼僅依賴於視覺生成模型的圖像生成能力，而這些模型缺乏這種知識，要麼僅在分割階段利用它，這使得它無法明確指導完成過程。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了AmodalCG，一個新穎的框架，利用多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）的現實世界知識來指導無模式完成。我們的框架首先評估遮擋的程度，僅在目標物體被嚴重遮擋時選擇性地調用MLLM指導。如果需要指導，該框架進一步結合MLLM來推理（1）缺失區域的範圍和（2）內容。最後，一個視覺生成模型整合這些指導，並迭代地完善可能由不準確的MLLM指導引起的不完美完成。對各種現實世界圖像的實驗結果顯示，相較於所有現有工作，取得了令人印象深刻的改進，這表明MLLMs是一個解決挑戰性無模式完成的有前景方向。
2603.28333.author: Heecheol Yun et.al.
